author: lOrm
content: Plan mode allow check refactored to hard explicit default-deny. is_tool_allowed_in_plan_mode now follows a 5-step explicit flow: (1) mcp__/plugin__ prefix gate (denied by default, opt-in via PlanModePolicy.allow_mcp_tools/allow_plugin_tools), (2) plan-mode markers, (3) write_file-to-plan-file (TOCTOU-safe, #334), (4) explicit PLAN_MODE_ALLOWED_TOOLS allowlist, (5) hard deny. PLAN_MODE_BLOCKED_TOOLS const deleted (was redundant). New companion fn is_tool_allowed_in_plan_mode_with_policy exposes the policy. 4 new tests: known-allowed, unknown-denied, mcp-prefix-denied-by-default (incl shadow attack mcp__evil__read_file), plugin-prefix-denied-by-default. cargo test --lib: 1277 passed. cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings: exit 0. No #[allow]/clippy.toml/#[ignore].
